nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 红腹拟鹩哥
nodes.summary: 红腹拟鹩哥（Red-bellied grackle，学名 Hypopyrrhus pyrohypogaster），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Da Fonseca |name-list-style=amp |publisher=Cambridge University Press |isbn=978-0-521-82502-3 |chapter-url=https://books.google.com/books?id=3W_TN0790vEC&pg=PA293}} One of the grackles, it is endemic to Colombia where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is threatened by habitat destruction and the International Union for Conservation of Nature considers it to be a "vulnerable species"
